text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The autumn Tenno Sho has finally arrived. Eishin
Flash's parents are in the crowd, and she asks me
to watch the race with them.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Eishin Flash reflects upon her journey as the
crowd roars around her. It all started from her
sense of what is "right," and now at the end...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She realizes how many experiences and
connections she's formed. She quietly burns,
excited for the chance to show the three of us the
truth that she's found for herself.
